bluetooth.turned_off:
Bluetooth is turned off.
Please enable Bluetooth in Settings.
bluetooth.permission_denied:
Bluetooth permission is not granted.
Please allow access in Settings.
bluetooth.unsupported: This device does not support Bluetooth.
bluetooth.restarting: Bluetooth is restarting. Please try again shortly.
device.error_cannot_start: A device has reported an internal error and cannot start training. (%@)
device.error_manikin_cannot_start: The connected manikin has reported an internal error and cannot start training.
device.error_detail:
The connected device has reported an internal error. Training is not available until the error is resolved.
(%@)

%@
device.disconnected_message: You can't proceed without a connected device. Please reconnect it and resume from the last suspended step.
device.how_to_connect_step3: 3. Select a device from the list.
device.how_to_connect_step4: 4. If a manikin is connected, check that its light is on. If AED-Trainer is connected, a sound will be heard.
device.disconnected_training_cancelled:
The device has been disconnected.
The training session has been cancelled.
device.unexpected_disconnect_cancelled:
The device was disconnected unexpectedly.
The training session has been cancelled.
device.failed_connect_cancelled:
Failed to connect to the device.
The training session has been cancelled.
manikin.pick_type_title:
Pick a manikin type
for training
result.calculation_failed_server:
We apologize for the inconvenience.
Please contact your manager for assistance.
result.calculation_failed_network:
Please check your internet connection and try again.
If the issue persists, restart the training.
tts.start: Please start when you are ready
tts.aed_arrived: The AED has arrived. Please turn it on.
help.failed_to_load: Failed to load help documents. Please try again.
help.guidance_subtitle:
Here are instructions from
HealthStream Red Cross Practice Center
login.welcome_subtitle:
Master your high quality CPR skills and earn digital certificates(BLS, ALS, PALS) with the
American Red Cross Resuscitation Suite and Brayden Pro manikins.
To complete your skills checks on your facility's dedicated self-directed manikin and
Resuscitation.
Register fot your hStream ID from your learning management system before attempting to
access skills checks.
org.which_organization: Which organization are you completing this skills check for?
training.guideline_compression: Perform chest compressions on the manikin
training.guideline_3cycles_cpr: Perform 3 cycles of CPR on the manikin
training.guideline_3cycles_aed: Perform 3 cycles of CPR with AED-T on the manikin
training.guideline_subtitle: Your first passing score will be recorded in your transcript.
